## Type of change

<!-- Mark with an x -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)

- [ ] Maintenance (CI, dependencies, tooling)

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Commands run, manual scenarios, integration notes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed **branch naming** and **Conventional Commits** in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `make verify` passes locally (fmt, tidy, build, vet, lint, test)
- [ ] I updated **documentation** if user-facing behavior or setup changed
- [ ] I did **not** commit secrets or paste them into this description
- [ ] For security-sensitive matters, I followed [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) (no public disclosure before coordinated fix)
